face.shape: soft oval face with balanced narrow proportions
face.nose: straight slim nose with delicate narrow bridge and softly rounded tip
face.lips: natural full lips with muted pink tone and softly defined cupid bow
face.cheek_structure: subtle cheek definition with smooth youthful fullness
face.jawline: soft tapered jawline with refined chin

eyes.shape: almond eyes with a calm level gaze
eyes.color: warm light brown to hazel brown
eyes.upper_lid: soft visible lid space with minimal hooding
eyes.lower_lid: smooth lower lid with fine natural texture
eyes.brow_shape: straight softly arched brows with clean shape and medium density

skin.base_texture: smooth skin with visible fine pores in nose and inner cheek area
skin.under_eye_texture: subtle natural under-eye texture with faint tonal depth
skin.pigmentation_pattern: very even complexion with slight natural shadowing around eyes and nostrils

hair.flyaway_pattern: mostly sleek with a few fine stray hairs near the crown

distinguishing_marks: small subtle beauty mark near the lower left side of the face close to the mouth area
very clean blunt bob line at the jaw

signature_styling.makeup: minimal clean makeup, natural brows, soft lip color, no heavy liner
signature_styling.wardrobe_reference: white high-neck top or turtleneck minimal styling
